approaches_tried: A: random_seed sweep under canonical orientation (peak 0.638)
D/E: theta_sign=-1 (+/- reverse order) collapsed to 0.164 without reverse_circumferential; with reverse_circ recovered to 0.641 but below F
H: other n_segment windows (no better than F)

conclusion: Bounded deterministic retune improved 4-1 from 0.634 → 0.661 (+0.027 vs frozen anchor 0.635) but did not recover the legacy 0.741 / clear the 0.70 bar. The legacy 0.741 depended on an unpinned-RANSAC theta mirror that is not cleanly reachable via h_ring_sign or theta_sign under the current geometric tiler; further gains need a deeper detection/SAM redesign beyond this bounded sweep.
